name: @nimbalyst/extension-apple-photos
description: Apple Photos browser + AI for Nimbalyst

scripts._disabled_build:python_: bash scripts/build-vendored-python.sh -- the osxphotos / direct sqlite path was abandoned after we discovered Photos.sqlite reads are TCC-blocked when attributed to Nimbalyst.app on macOS Sonoma+. We now use osascript via Photos.app instead. The vendored venv directory can be deleted: rm -rf vendored/.
